raw_consumer_statement: I was scammed out if {$510.00} by a person pretending to be a book editor. When she demanded more money and got nasty, I knew I made a mistake. Despite immediately disputing this twice, providing copies of texts, they paid her. I got nothing from her and she doesnt have my manuscript for review. She demands another {$1700.00}. There is an online history of XXXX XXXX ripping people off. My credit card company went against me and XXXX did nothing. They continue to allow her scamming of victims.
